feed.title: Freddy Friends | Stories
feed.subtitle: A blog about our sailing adventures around the world

entry.title: Drive across the country
entry.content:
Update

On a bit of a whim, we decided to pack up and drive across the country.

Route Highlights

  1. Topock
    A bit of a random stop
  2. Flagstaff
    The darkest hotel bedroom in history. Oh, and the coldest pool!
  3. Santa Fe
    Awesome place - loved it!
  4. Childress
    By far the worst place that we stayed. But… Texas-shaped waffle maker!
  5. Shreveport
    Just needed something a little nicer than the average hotel… Margaritaville!
  6. New Orleans
    The earplugs on the bedside table were the giveaway
  7. Tallahassee
    Cool little hotel
